name: Onaje Allan Gumbs
abstract: Onaje Allan Gumbs (born Allan Bentley Gumbs, September 3, 1949 – April 6, 2020) was a New York–based pianist, composer, and bandleader.

interviews.title: Onaje Allan Gumbs interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001

concerts.label: Tribute to Charles Mingus: Mingus Music

about_quotes.speaker: Mcbee
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...played on your record, Onaje Allan Gumbs. [INTERVIEWEE] Oh what’s that, “Mutima?”
